title: coffea benghalensis var. bababudanii
intro: Coffea benghalensis var. bababudanii, also known as Bababudan coffee, is a variety of coffee plant native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coffea benghalensis var. bababudanii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and powders, often used to make teas, capsules, and other supplements.
